description_long: This is a finely detailed bust sculpture of a distinguished male figure, dressed in a formal military uniform adorned with medals and sashes. The bust features a stern, contemplative facial expression, with carefully sculpted hair and prominent cheekbones. The shoulders are broad and decorated with epaulettes, and the uniform is richly textured, suggesting high rank and honor. The base is rectangular and solid, providing stability and a sense of permanence. The back of the bust is less detailed, focusing on the contours of the shoulders and head. The entire sculpture appears to be made from a single piece of light-colored stone or marble, giving it a classical and dignified appearance.
description: A classical bust of a decorated male military figure in uniform, rendered in light-colored stone with detailed facial features and uniform decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, uniform decorations, and medals.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the side of the face, ear, and the layered texture of the uniform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, neck, and the broad, less detailed shoulders.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the opposite side of the face and uniform, mirroring the left.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is neutral and does not indicate a specific setting.
